rootCauseAnalysis.summary: Node disk pressure caused by excessive container log accumulation from verbose debug logging

rawResponses:
Based on my investigation, here is the root cause analysis:

```json
{"rca_summary":"Node disk pressure caused by excessive container log accumulation from verbose debug logging in the logging-agent DaemonSet","signal_name":"KubeNodeCondition","severity":"medium","confidence":0.78,"remediation_target":{"kind":"DaemonSet","name":"logging-agent","namespace":"kube-system"},"contributing_factors":["Debug-level logging enabled in production","No log rotation configured"],"investigation_outcome":"actionable"}
```

The node is experiencing disk pressure due to excessive logging from the logging-agent DaemonSet.
